author: nflaig
content:
Hey all, was curious if anyone implemented a PoC already that can run on kurtosis, I only remember that Prysm did but not sure what's the status there.

been working on implementing this in Lodestar  based on what's in https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/pull/4484 and wanna check if there is another client to interop with

currently custom fork `eip7782` which is on top of fulu but this should be easy to rebase on gloas
```yaml
participants:
  - el_type: geth
    cl_type: lodestar
    cl_image: ethpandaops/lodestar:eip7782
    count: 2

network_params:
  eip7782_fork_epoch: 1

additional_services:
  - dora

dora_params:
  image: "nflaig/dora:eip7782-support"
```
needs custom dora image and `github.com/nflaig/ethereum-package@eip7782` to support all params and make dora behave properly
